title: Cherven Breg
summary:
Cherven Breg (Bulgarian: Червен брег, also transliterated Červen Breg) is a village in Dupnitsa Municipality, Kyustendil Province, south-western Bulgaria.


== References ==
text: Cherven Breg (Bulgarian: Червен брег, also transliterated Červen Breg) is a village in Dupnitsa Municipality, Kyustendil Province, south-western Bulgaria.
